query:
-- Delete orphan manual CRM contacts with no active project link
DELETE c FROM contacts c
WHERE c.enrichmentSource = 'manual'
  AND c.contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM contactProjects cp
    INNER JOIN projects p ON p.id = cp.projectId
    WHERE cp.contactId = c.id
      AND p.suppressed = false
      AND p.lifecycleStatus IN ('active', 'awarded')
  );
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute 
-- Delete orphan manual CRM contacts with no active project link
DELETE c FROM contacts c
WHERE c.enrichmentSource = 'manual'
  AND c.contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM contactProjects cp
    INNER JOIN projects p ON p.id = cp.projectId
    WHERE cp.contactId = c.id
      AND p.suppressed = false
      AND p.lifecycleStatus IN ('active', 'awarded')
  );
